sections.paragraph:
Original: דּקלה

Transliteration: diqlâh

Phonetic: dik-law'

BDB Definition:

Diklah = "palm grove"
  1. a son of Joktan of Arabia (noun proper masculine)
  2. an Arabian territory or people? (noun proper locative)

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
